note_text: 5yo boy fever 3 days, cough, rapid breathing. mother says hot body at night. no rash. eating OK but tired.
woman 30yr cough 1 week, fever on and off, chest pain when breathing deep. no diarrhea no vomiting.
infant 8mo, mother reports hot body since yesterday, refused breast milk this morning, fast breathing noticed. no rash no diarrhea.
pt male 45 fever and headache 2 days. dry cough. lives near swamp area. no vomiting.
girl 3yr high fever 39C, cough with noisy breathing, chest pulling in. not eating well. siblings also sick.
elderly man approx 65, coughing blood-streaked sputum, feverish, losing weight. referred to district hospital.
teenager 15yr, sore throat and fever 2 day, mild cough. eating and drinking OK. no danger signs.
child 2yr hot body, running nose, cough, difficulty breathing noticed by mother. no diarrhea. immunization not up to date.
female 28, fever chills body pain 4 days. tested RDT negative for malaria yesterday at pharmacy. still coughing.
boy 7yr fever cough 5 days not improving, fast breathing, mother says cant sleep at night from coughing. no vomiting no rash.
man 50 chronic cough 3wk, fever evening time, night sweats, weight loss. wife had TB last year.
woman 25 pregnant 7mo, fever and cough started yesterday, mild headache. no bleeding no watery discharge.
4yr girl hot body dry cough no runny nose. mother gave paracetamol at home. still feverish today.
baby 11mo fever 2 days, cough, pulling in of chest when breathing. not breastfeeding well. restless.
adult male farmer, hot body, headache, muscle aches, mild cough. rainy season. no diarrhea.
child 6yr fever runny nose sneezing. no difficulty breathing no chest indrawing. playful. eating OK.
woman elderly 70, cough worse at night, feverish, body aches. has diabetes. no diarrhea.
10yo boy boarding school, several students sick with fever and cough. this boy fever 38.5 dry cough 3d.
male 35, fever off and on 1 wk, productive cough yellow sputum, no blood. chest tight.
girl 1yr high fever convulsion at home this morning. mother brought child, now alert but hot. cough present.
man 40, feverish, general weakness, cough started 2 days ago. no rash no diarrhea. family history of asthma.
adolescent girl 14, hot body sore throat cough 1 day. ate normally. no vomiting no diarrhea.
child 4yr brought by grandmother. feverish, coughing, not eating since yesterday. grandmother says breathing fast.
adult 38 male, high fever shaking chills rigors. headache body pain cough. malaria RDT pending.
baby 6mo, mother says hot body 1 day, cough and running nose. breastfeeding OK. no convulsion.
child 3yr watery diarrhea 5 times since morning, vomiting twice. mother says no blood in stool. not drinking well.
woman 22 loose watery stool since yesterday, 4 episodes. mild stomach cramps. no fever checked. drinking ORS at home.
man 55 sudden onset watery diarrhea and vomiting today. rice-water stools. becoming weak. lives near river.
baby 10mo watery stool 6 times, vomiting everything given. sunken eyes noticed. mother very worried.
adult female 30 diarrhea 3 days, watery. no blood. mild fever. eating less but drinking water.
elderly man 68, watery stool many times today, vomiting, too weak to stand. skin pinch slow return.
child 5yr loose stool 3 times. no vomiting. playful and drinking. mother asking for ORS.
girl 2yr diarrhea watery 8 episodes since last night. vomiting. eyes sunken, mouth dry, very sleepy.
pt male 40, running stomach since morning, watery stool no blood, mild cramps. ate leftover food yesterday.
woman 35 diarrhea 2 days, watery, + vomiting. no fever. neighbor also has diarrhea. water source shared borehole.
infant 7mo stool very watery greenish 4 times. breastfed only. no vomiting. fontanelle slightly sunken.
boy 8yr stomach pain and watery diarrhea after school. vomited once. drinking water. no fever.
male 25 sudden diarrhea rice-water type, cramping, vomiting. co-workers also affected. ate same food at canteen.
child 18mo diarrhea 7x today, watery, refuses to drink. crying with no tears. restless.
adolescent 16yr female, loose stool watery 3 days, abdominal cramps, no blood. mild nausea. drinking fluids OK.
woman 40, watery diarrhea started night before, 5 episodes. vomiting x2. thirsty, drinking ORS. no fever.
elderly woman 75, watery stools all day. too weak to eat. family says she is confused. dry mouth, sunken eyes.
child 4yr brought from school, diarrhea watery 4x, no blood, mild tummy ache. active and drinking.
man 28 diarrhea profuse watery no blood. started after drinking river water. vomiting present. weak.
baby 14mo loose watery stool. mother says 3 episodes. still breastfeeding. no vomiting. mild fever.
child 6yr rash all over body, eyes red, fever 4 days. measles in village. cough present.
woman 32, skin wound on left leg infected. swollen and red with pus. no fever. cleaning wound daily.
man 48 diabetic, numbness in feet getting worse, blurred vision sometimes. no fever no cough.
pregnant woman 26, headache and swollen legs. BP high reading at last ANC visit. no fever no cough no diarrhea.
boy 9yr fell from tree, arm swollen very painful. cannot move it. no open wound. no fever.
girl 12yr severe stomach pain lower right, vomiting once. no diarrhea. no fever. pain getting worse.
adult male 37 painful urination 3 days. yellowish discharge. no fever. sexually active.
child 5yr itchy scalp, hair falling out patches. no fever no cough. several children at school affected.
woman 45 lump in breast noticed 2 months ago. getting bigger. no pain. no fever. referred.
elderly 72 male, joint pain both knees getting worse. using walking stick. no history of fever.
pt came in feeling generally unwell. tired. no specific complaints. eating less.
child 3yr mother says not well since 2 days. no fever measured. eats little. no cough no stool problems.
man approx 50, body not right, headache. feverish maybe but no thermometer. no cough. stool normal.
woman 23 dizziness and fatigue. ate today. no vomiting. no diarrhea. no cough. might be pregnant.
adolescent boy body aches 1 day. no fever yet. no cough. bowel OK. could be overwork from farm.
